prompt: Put these steps for baking a loaf of bread in order.
correctSequence: Mix flour, water, yeast, and salt in a bowl.
Knead the dough until it is smooth.
Let it rise for about an hour.
Shape it and place it in a pan.
Bake until the top is golden brown.

prompt: Put these steps for changing a flat tire in order.
correctSequence: Pull the car safely off the road.
Loosen the lug nuts on the flat tire.
Lift the car with the jack.
Remove the flat and put on the spare.
Tighten the lug nuts and lower the car.

prompt: Put these steps for hosting a dinner party in order.
correctSequence: Plan the menu and write a shopping list.
Buy the groceries.
Cook each dish in time for serving.
Set the table and welcome guests.
Serve the meal and enjoy the evening.

prompt: Put these steps for going on a road trip in order.
correctSequence: Plan the route on a map.
Pack a small bag with clothes and snacks.
Fill the car with gas.
Drive to the destination.
Check into the hotel for the night.

prompt: Put these steps for repotting a plant in order.
correctSequence: Choose a larger pot.
Add fresh soil to the bottom.
Slide the plant out of its old pot.
Set it into the new pot and fill in soil around it.
Water it well.

prompt: Put these steps for paying a bill by check in order.
correctSequence: Open the bill and read the total.
Write the check for that amount.
Sign the check.
Place it in the return envelope.
Drop it in the mailbox.

prompt: Put these steps for canning tomatoes in order.
correctSequence: Boil the tomatoes briefly to loosen the skins.
Peel and core them.
Pack them into clean jars.
Process the jars in a hot water bath.
Let the jars seal as they cool on the counter.

prompt: Put these steps for setting up a new computer in order.
correctSequence: Take it out of the box.
Plug in the cables.
Turn it on.
Sign in with your account.
Open the program you want to use.

prompt: Put these steps for hanging a picture on the wall in order.
correctSequence: Decide where you want to hang it.
Mark the spot with a pencil.
Tap a small nail into the mark.
Hang the picture on the nail.
Step back and adjust until it is straight.

prompt: Put these steps for making homemade chicken soup in order.
correctSequence: Place the chicken in a big pot of water.
Add carrots, celery, and onion.
Simmer for an hour and a half.
Lift out the chicken and shred the meat.
Return the meat to the pot and season the broth.

prompt: Put these steps for going to a movie at the theater in order.
correctSequence: Check the show times in the paper.
Drive to the theater.
Buy a ticket at the window.
Buy popcorn at the snack counter.
Find a seat before the lights go down.

prompt: Put these steps for changing the oil in a car in order.
correctSequence: Drive the car onto ramps.
Place a pan under the oil pan.
Loosen the drain plug and let the old oil drain.
Replace the plug and the filter.
Pour in fresh oil and check the level.

prompt: Put these steps for organizing a closet in order.
correctSequence: Take everything out.
Decide what to keep and what to give away.
Wipe down the shelves.
Group like items together.
Put everything back in an orderly way.

prompt: Put these steps for booking a doctor's appointment in order.
correctSequence: Look up the office number.
Call during business hours.
Tell the receptionist what you need.
Choose a date and time that works.
Write the appointment on your calendar.

prompt: Put these steps for making a pot roast in order.
correctSequence: Heat oil in a heavy pot.
Brown the roast on all sides.
Add onions, carrots, and broth.
Cover and simmer for several hours.
Slice the roast and serve with the vegetables.

prompt: Put these steps for refinishing a wooden chair in order.
correctSequence: Sand the old finish off.
Wipe the chair with a damp cloth.
Apply a coat of stain.
Let it dry overnight.
Brush on a coat of varnish.

prompt: Put these steps for harvesting potatoes in order.
correctSequence: Wait until the plant tops have died down.
Use a fork to loosen the soil.
Lift each potato out by hand.
Brush off the loose dirt.
Spread them on a tray to cure for a few days.

prompt: Put these steps for ordering at a sit-down restaurant in order.
correctSequence: Wait to be seated by the host.
Look over the menu.
Tell the waiter your order.
Eat the food when it comes.
Pay the bill before leaving.

prompt: Put these steps for putting up a screen door in order.
correctSequence: Measure the door frame.
Cut the door to fit if needed.
Hold it in place and mark the hinge spots.
Screw in the hinges.
Test that it swings smoothly.

prompt: Put these steps for renewing a driver's license in order.
correctSequence: Find your old license.
Drive to the licensing office.
Wait in line and turn in the form.
Have your photo taken.
Pay the fee and receive the new license.

prompt: Put these steps for making strawberry jam in order.
correctSequence: Wash and hull the strawberries.
Crush them in a large pot.
Add sugar and lemon juice.
Boil until it thickens.
Pour into clean jars and seal.

prompt: Put these steps for raking and bagging leaves in order.
correctSequence: Pull the rake out of the shed.
Rake the leaves into several piles.
Open a yard waste bag.
Scoop the leaves in a few handfuls at a time.
Tie the bag and set it at the curb.

prompt: Put these steps for going to the bank to deposit a check in order.
correctSequence: Sign the back of the check.
Drive to the bank.
Fill out a deposit slip.
Hand the slip and check to the teller.
Take the receipt and leave.

prompt: Put these steps for assembling a bookshelf in order.
correctSequence: Open the box and lay out the parts.
Read the instructions all the way through.
Connect the side panels to the base.
Slide in the shelves.
Stand it up and test that it is steady.

prompt: Put these steps for cleaning out the refrigerator in order.
correctSequence: Take everything out and put it on the counter.
Throw away anything spoiled.
Wipe down each shelf.
Wipe the inside of the door.
Put the good items back in an orderly way.

prompt: Put these steps for grilling a steak in order.
correctSequence: Take the steak out of the fridge a half hour ahead.
Sprinkle it with salt and pepper.
Heat the grill until it is hot.
Lay the steak down for several minutes per side.
Let it rest before cutting into it.

prompt: Put these steps for paying for a hotel stay in order.
correctSequence: Walk up to the front desk.
Tell them your room number.
Hand over your credit card.
Sign the receipt.
Take your bags and head to your car.

prompt: Put these steps for fixing a leaky faucet in order.
correctSequence: Turn off the water under the sink.
Take the handle off the faucet.
Replace the worn washer inside.
Put the handle back on.
Turn the water on and check for leaks.

prompt: Put these steps for hosting houseguests for a weekend in order.
correctSequence: Make up the guest bed with fresh sheets.
Set out clean towels in the bathroom.
Greet your guests when they arrive.
Show them their room.
Plan a meal together for that evening.

prompt: Put these steps for making meatloaf in order.
correctSequence: Mix ground beef, eggs, breadcrumbs, and seasoning.
Press the mixture into a loaf pan.
Spread ketchup on top.
Bake at 350 for about an hour.
Let it cool for ten minutes before slicing.

prompt: Put these steps for buying a used car in order.
correctSequence: Decide what you can spend.
Look at listings online or at the dealer.
Take the car for a test drive.
Negotiate the price.
Sign the paperwork and drive home.

prompt: Put these steps for shoveling a snowy driveway in order.
correctSequence: Put on a coat, boots, and gloves.
Take the shovel out of the garage.
Clear a path down the middle of the driveway.
Push the snow to either side.
Sprinkle salt on icy spots.

prompt: Put these steps for hosting a birthday dinner in order.
correctSequence: Pick a date and invite the family.
Plan the menu.
Cook in the morning so the day is calm.
Set the table with the good plates.
Serve dinner and bring out the cake.

prompt: Put these steps for going to a Sunday morning church service in order.
correctSequence: Wake up and have breakfast.
Get dressed.
Drive to the church.
Sit in your usual pew.
Greet friends after the service.

prompt: Put these steps for making applesauce in order.
correctSequence: Peel and core the apples.
Cut them into chunks.
Cook them in a pot with a little water.
Mash or blend until smooth.
Stir in cinnamon and sugar to taste.

prompt: Put these steps for sending a package by mail in order.
correctSequence: Pack the items in a box with padding.
Tape the box shut.
Write the address on the top.
Carry it to the post office.
Pay for postage at the counter.

prompt: Put these steps for cleaning the gutters in order.
correctSequence: Set up the ladder against the house.
Climb up with a small bucket.
Scoop out the leaves and debris.
Move the ladder along the roof line.
Rinse the gutter with a hose.

prompt: Put these steps for changing the bedsheets in order.
correctSequence: Pull the old sheets off.
Carry them to the laundry room.
Get fresh sheets from the closet.
Put the bottom sheet on the mattress.
Add the top sheet, blanket, and pillows.

prompt: Put these steps for making coffee for a crowd in order.
correctSequence: Take out a large coffee maker.
Fill the reservoir with cold water.
Place a paper filter in the basket.
Add coffee grounds.
Press start and let it brew.

prompt: Put these steps for renting a movie at the library in order.
correctSequence: Walk to the movie shelves.
Pick a title that looks good.
Take it to the desk.
Hand over your library card.
Watch it that evening at home.

prompt: Put these steps for getting ready for a thunderstorm in order.
correctSequence: Listen to the weather report.
Bring loose items inside from the porch.
Close all the windows.
Set out flashlights in case of an outage.
Sit down somewhere dry to wait it out.

prompt: Put these steps for going for a long bike ride in order.
correctSequence: Check that the tires have air.
Put on a helmet.
Fill a water bottle.
Ride to the trail.
Take a rest at the halfway point.

prompt: Put these steps for making a pie crust from scratch in order.
correctSequence: Mix flour and salt.
Cut in cold butter with a pastry blender.
Sprinkle in cold water and stir.
Roll the dough out on a floured surface.
Fit it into the pie pan.

prompt: Put these steps for setting up a backyard barbecue in order.
correctSequence: Roll the grill out of the garage.
Light the burners or coals.
Bring out the platter of meat.
Lay the meat on the grill.
Let it cook, turning once.

prompt: Put these steps for borrowing a book from the library in order.
correctSequence: Look up the book in the catalog.
Find it on the right shelf.
Carry it to the front desk.
Hand the librarian your card.
Walk out with the book.

prompt: Put these steps for taking a train to the city in order.
correctSequence: Check the schedule.
Drive to the station.
Buy a ticket.
Wait on the platform.
Board when the train arrives.

prompt: Put these steps for cleaning a fish you caught in order.
correctSequence: Lay the fish on a board.
Scale it with the back of a knife.
Cut along the belly to clean it out.
Rinse it in cold water.
Wrap it for the cooler.

prompt: Put these steps for putting up a tent on a camping trip in order.
correctSequence: Find a flat spot to pitch the tent.
Spread out the tent body.
Slide the poles into their sleeves.
Stand the tent up and stake the corners.

prompt: Put these steps for installing a smoke detector in order.
correctSequence: Pick a spot on the ceiling.
Mark the screw holes with a pencil.
Drill small holes at the marks.
Screw the base into place.

prompt: Put these steps for cleaning the oven in order.
correctSequence: Take out the racks.
